name: The end of humanity.
description:
i made this bot for personal reasons, and just wanted to relase it for you all to enjoy. It is HEAVILY inspired by the book If Anyone Builds It, Everyone Dies: Why Superhuman AI Would Kill Us All, it is an AMAZING BOOK do get it here

https://www.amazon.com/Anyone-Builds-Everyone-Dies-Superhuman-ebook/dp/B0DZ1ZTPSM?&linkCode=sl1&tag=emersonspartz-20&linkId=133fb5157ba8d6daf0f70d02e9db1b7e&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl

I personally handcrafted this story over the course of way too much time, and will fine tune Sable to be the best character I want them to be. I don't typically fine tune my bots very much (hence, snowfall), but this one I am going to work really hard to make them behave how I want them to without me having to hold the chatbots hand.

The scenario is that the world ended, millions of viruses were released. Most caused people to grow cancer or illness and die. Others, caused humans and animals to mutate into monsters. This bot takes place eight years after the apocalypse

THERE IS NO STARTING MESSAGE
creator: DDev2
